presets.name: UA PVOM
presets.description: PVOM (Passive Vocabulary, Oral Mastery) - high cognitive load

presets.name: UA Visual
presets.description: Visual prefix diagrams - low cognitive load

presets.name: UA Grammar
presets.description: Grammar cloze cards - medium cognitive load

presets.name: UA->EN
presets.description: Lexeme recognition (UA→EN) - medium cognitive load, unlimited reviews

presets.name: UA Production Pass-through
presets.description: Middle parent pass-through - no throttling, children handle limits

presets.name: UA Recognition Pass-through
presets.description: Middle parent pass-through - no throttling, children handle limits

notes: This file defines deck presets for UA domain. Each preset is created if it doesn't exist, then assigned to the specified decks. Total new cards across all child presets (18 + 15 + 25 + 20 + 20 = 98) is balanced against parent limit (50 per day) by having only subset active at a time.
